reason: Quality check must verify this task against current Trellis spec authority.
Check that offload stays a runtime boundary and no high-level compute IR or custom ISA modeling was added.
Check capability-driven availability and fail-closed semantics.
Check that tcrv.exec remains compute-free and orchestration-focused.
Check plugin interface and registry compliance.
Check plugin-locality and target-neutral core behavior.
Check proposal, legality, preference, and selection ordering.
Check lowering boundary, runtime ABI, emission readiness, and manifest validation.
Check generic runtime-offload behavior and exclusions.
Check that offload does not depend on RVV probe facts or executable RVV claims.
Check scalar fallback remains available when offload cannot be selected.
